And so think of it as like a lot of us are former in-house marketers who, you know, have dabbled and built varying things around this and we just found a need and have grown quite fast in building this business around just a lot of demand, obviously, of need for teams to move faster and wanting to lean into AI in a variety of ways.

think I noted this a little bit in my message.

or anything that has that effect.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Udemy's lifecycle marketing and newsletter strategies to inform potential GrowthX AI collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI is scoping a potential weekly newsletter focused on AI enablement for Udemy Business (UB)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Udemy's lifecycle marketing is segmented by audience (B2B learners, admins, consumers, instructors)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Email systems are fragmented (Braze, transactional, prospects) with strict sending limits (1/day, 3/week max)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Content strategy needs to balance gated/ungated experiences and avoid duplicating existing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX AI's Proposed Newsletter Project

  - [Weekly cadence focused on AI enablement, thought leadership, education](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Aims to drive up Average Selling Price (ASP) for Udemy Business](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Early stages: refining metrics, audience, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Challenges: working within Udemy's existing systems vs. using GrowthX's preferred platform (Beehive)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)

### Udemy's Current Email Landscape

  - [Lifecycle teams recently restructured by audience segments](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Existing quarterly newsletter for admins and learners](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Email platforms:](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Braze: Main system for lifecycle emails](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [Unnamed system: Transactional emails (product-owned)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Third system: Prospect emails](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Strict sending limits: 1 email/day, 3 emails/week max per user](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Challenge: Potential noise from transactional emails outside Braze limits](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### B2B Learner Lifecycle Marketing

  - [Focuses on existing enterprise subscribers (UB, UB Pro, TeamPlan)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Key campaign types:](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
      - [Onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
      - [Retention (post-onboarding)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
      - [Feature adoption (e.g., AI features like role play, AI assistant)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Collaborative efforts with integrated marketing (e.g., webinar promotions)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Sensitive to over-communication, risk of org-wide unsubscribes](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

### Content Accessibility and Upselling

  - [Most B2B learners have full access to UB catalog](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Some specialized subscriptions (e.g., "AI starter pack") with limited course access](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [UB vs. UB Pro feature differences create upselling opportunities (e.g., Labs feature)](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Challenge: Limited ungated content for potential newsletter subscribers not yet in Udemy ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clarify newsletter audience (existing customers vs. prospects) to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Investigate ungated content options for potential use in newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/j7zsPDxFBycFqQm66zjyyWfgd9cEpXpw?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
